programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.1m of onshore swell and a 12-second period, there'll be something to laugh at, probably me getting washed up the beach.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 10.0km/h SW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 20.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

🌊 Swell: 3.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 38.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Lagide's 3.5m swell with this wind suggests a guaranteed workout swimming out, and probably back in, repeatedly.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
